meta_description: Discover the 50 best thought leaders in healthcare for 2026, from digital health innovators to patient safety champions. Follow these influential healthcare leaders.
alt_text: Best thought leaders in healthcare 2026 featuring top healthcare innovators and leaders
excerpt: If you are looking for the most influential thought leaders in healthcare to follow, learn from, or collaborate with, you have come to the right place. This comprehensive guide features 50 of the best thought leaders in healthcare across clinical innovation, digital health, patient safety, health equity, nursing leadership, public health policy, and more.

featured_people.name: Eric Topol
featured_people.context_note: Most influential voice in digital medicine, 370K+ citations
